description.text: UR20 — Kollaborativer Roboterarm, Typverwaltungsschale

Contains the nameplate information attached to the product
Technical data for the asset and its associated product properties.
Technische Daten des Assets und zugehörige Produkteigenschaften.
Customer-relevant technical properties of the UR20 collaborative robot.
Kundenrelevante technische Eigenschaften des kollaborativen Roboters UR20.
Maximum horizontal reach of the robot arm in millimetres.
Maximum payload at the tool flange in kilograms.
Mechanical weight of the robot arm in kilograms (excluding controller).
Number of independently controllable axes of motion.
Anzahl der unabhängig steuerbaren Bewegungsachsen.
Position repeatability at the tool centre point in millimetres.
Maximum linear velocity at the tool centre point under nominal load.
Typical linear velocity at the tool centre point under nominal operating conditions.
Typische lineare Geschwindigkeit am Tool-Center-Point unter Nennbedingungen.
Ingress-protection classification per IEC 60529.
Minimum permissible ambient operating temperature.
Maximum permissible ambient operating temperature.
Indicates whether the robot supports collaborative operation without a safety fence per ISO/TS 15066.
Reference safety standard satisfied by the robot arm.

value.value: EN ISO 13849-1 PLd Cat 3; EN ISO 10218-1; UL 1740
